name: Media Maratón de Mérida
summary: A loop half marathon through the historic center of Mérida, a UNESCO World Heritage city, starting and finishing near the iconic Puente Romano over the Guadiana river.
heroNote: Great cheering spots near Puente Lusitania around km 3, at the Acueducto de los Milagros around km 12, and near the Teatro Romano around km 19.
